behavior: Secretive but energetic; forages on the ground and in shrubs, often flipping leaf litter with its bill. Its voice includes varied phrases and a characteristic catlike mew.
field_marks: Broad, rounded wings and relatively long dark legs
habitat: Dense, low-growing cover: shrub and vine tangles, thickets, hedges, brushy field edges, and streamside or woodland-edge vegetation.

sources.title: Gray Catbird Identification — All About Birds
